title: Single-session long-memory black-box capture protocol
startingState: Begin in a new product conversation with no project files attached. Record the visible product, surface, date, and model setting. Paste the prepared benchmark turns in their published order without editing product responses.
interactionRules: Use the same prepared user turns and checkpoints for every product capture.
Do not reveal expected answers in prompts or ask the product to self-grade.
Do not start a replacement conversation, invoke a handoff summary, or manually remind the product of prior facts.
Record visible errors, refusals, compaction notices, and retry actions verbatim.
Score only after the transcript is frozen and hashed.
stopRule: Stop after the final prepared checkpoint probe or when the product prevents further turns; document whichever happens first.

scenarios.title: Recall an early durable fact after interference
scenarios.promptPurpose: Measure whether a fact established early in the same session remains answerable after unrelated turns.

scenarios.title: Prefer a corrected decision over its obsolete value
scenarios.promptPurpose: Measure current-versus-historical resolution without restating either value in the probe.

scenarios.title: Connect evidence introduced under separate topics
scenarios.promptPurpose: Measure multi-hop recall at the end of a project-scale single session.
